symptoms.symptom_name: Severe sore throat with bilateral tender cervical lymphadenopathy

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Post-EBV ME/CFS flare with reactive lymphadenopathy
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Recurrent sore throat and lymphadenopathy fit post-EBV immune reactivity.
Sore throat is non-specific; quinsy needs an exam to exclude.

symptoms.symptom_name: No drooling / able to swallow saliva, no stridor

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Ability to swallow saliva with quiet breathing argues against imminent airway compromise, though not against a developing abscess.

symptoms.symptom_name: Normal voice, no trismus, bilateral (not unilateral) throat

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: No muffled voice/trismus/unilateral swelling lowers quinsy probability, but an exam is needed.
Painful swallowing with poor intake risks dehydration.

symptoms.symptom_name: No high fever; recurrent stereotyped post-EBV flare

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Lack of high fever/exudate and chronic recurrent pattern lower strep probability.

symptoms.symptom_name: Mild bilateral tonsillar erythema, no exudate/uvular deviation, patent airway (examination)

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Post-EBV ME/CFS flare with reactive lymphadenopathy
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Mild bilateral erythema without exudate/deviation fits reactive pharyngitis.
No unilateral swelling/uvular deviation argues against quinsy on exam.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Post-EBV ME/CFS flare with reactive lymphadenopathy
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Prior EBV/ME-CFS is the substrate for recurrent immune flares.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: A recurrent post-EBV sore-throat/lymphadenopathy flare with a reassuring airway screen (swallowing saliva, no drooling/stridor/muffled voice/trismus) is most likely, but the throat cannot be examined remotely, so quinsy cannot be excluded and painful swallowing risks dehydration — urgent in-person throat assessment and hydration are required, with 000 for airway red flags.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: To exclude peritonsillar abscess and assess the airway; cannot be done via chat.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Throat swab ± EBV/monospot, FBC, and HIV serology if indicated
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: To assess bacterial/viral causes and confirm the post-viral picture.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Hydration assessment ± IV fluids if unable to drink
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Odynophagia with poor intake may require assisted hydration.
